---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what's wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps or a minimal request to reproduce the behavior, e.g.:

```jsonc
POST /chat
{ "input": "...", "db_url": "...", "model_name": "..." }
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- SQL Agent API version/commit:
- Python version:
- Deployment: local / Docker / other
- LLM provider/model used:

## Additional context

Logs, stack traces, or anything else that might help.
